editor.help_config_entry_id: Config entry ID of a Resrobot travel sensor (provides the API key) - leave blank for auto-detection
editor.help_api_key: Direct Resrobot API key (alternative to config entry ID)
editor.help_my_location_entity: Person or device_tracker entity used for 'My Location' button - leave blank for auto-detection
editor.help_home_zone: Zone entity for the Home button (default: zone.home)
editor.help_max_items: Maximum number of trips to display
editor.help_max_legs: Maximum number of legs rendered per trip
editor.help_max_walking_distance: Maximum walking distance in metres at origin and destination
editor.help_include_platform: Request platform/stop designator from the search service
editor.help_show_persons: Show HA-defined person entities as quick destination buttons
editor.help_show_zones: Show HA-defined zone entities as origin/destination options

error.no_api_key: No Resrobot API key configured. Set config_entry_id or api_key in card config.
error.my_location_not_configured: No location entity configured. Set my_location_entity in card config.
error.gps_unavailable: Could not get your device location. Please allow location access and try again.
